        lucide="BoldIcon"
        tabler="IconBold"
        hugeicons="TextBoldIcon"
        phosphor="TextBIcon"
        remixicon="RiBold"

    <ToggleGroupItem value="italic" aria-label="Toggle italic">

</template>
